name: You just had to walk in at the wrong time
description:
✨A NEW BOTS IS OUT AND READY✨

I know no one is keeping track on my uploading consistency but this bot was actually supposed to be out yesterday. The reason why I'm posting this bot a day behind is because it was late when I was working on it and I don't wanna post it at a time where it might get the least amount of views and interactions. I believe that's why my latest bot didn't do ass good because it was posted so late.

But I still really do appreciate the people who participated in the vote for the next bot, and even though the last bot didn't do as well it still got it still got seen, used, and voted on and that enough for me to be an accomplishment.

Bot-1 Ms, Rosie (the new girl in town)

Bot-3 Big Lola (the stripper)

IT'S OKAY TWO LEFT, VOTE FOR WHICH ONE YOU WANNA SEE NEXT, NOW!!!

Okie, bye bye!! 👋
creator: Kmo_030310
